case_title: PROPERTY TAX ADVISORS VS. JUAN VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $760.73 FILED BY PROPERTY TAX ADVISORS AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-12-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED JUNE 10, 2010 INDICATES ANOTHER PERSON SERVED, NOT THE NAMED DEFENDANT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, JUAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROPERTY TAX ADVISORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, JUAN $470.33 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT VASQUEZ, JUAN TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT PROPERTY TAX ADVISORS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:48am
Judge Pro Tem Al Anolik, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Juan Vasquez appears in pro per with court appointed interpreter Fanny Suarez. Respondent, Property Tax Advisors does not appear.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Anolik.

9:49am
Matter is dismissed, no appearance by the respondent.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Continued To Aug-12-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
